$comment: scripts/SaffronGym.asm SaffronGymSabrinaText — challenge -> OPP_SABRINA -> MARSHBADGE + BEAT_SABRINA + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM46. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
Everyone has
psychic power!
People just don't
realize it!

else.text:
I had a vision of
your arrival! I have had psychic
powers since I
was a child. I dislike fight-
ing, but if you
wish, I will show
you my powers!

then.text:
I'm
shocked!
But, a loss is a
loss. I admit I didn't
work hard enough
to win! You earned the
MARSHBADGE!

The MARSHBADGE
makes POKéMON up
to L70 obey you! Stronger POKéMON
will ignore your
orders in battle! Wait, please take
this TM with you!

TM46 is PSYWAVE! It uses powerful
psychic waves to
inflict damage!
